title: phyllota phylicoides var. aspera
intro: Phyllota phylicoides var. aspera, also known as rough leaf phyllota, is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Phyllota phylicoides var. aspera include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
